CONTENT.Club career: On 12 February 2016, Pereira Lage made his senior debut, appearing with Clermont in a Ligue 2 match against Ajaccio after coming on as a substitute in the 55th minute. In just his second appearance on 1 April for the same competition, he scored his first professional goal, in the dying minutes of a 3–0 away win over Créteil. In June 2022, he joined Breton club Brest.
CONTENT.External links: Mathias Pereira Lage at SoccerwayMathias Pereira Lage – French league stats at LFP – also available in French (archived)
CONTENT.International career: Born in France, Pereira Lage is of Portuguese descent. He played for the Portugal U21s in 2018.

SUMMARY: Mathias Pereira Lage (born 30 November 1996) is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Ligue 1 club Brest. Born in France, he is a former Portugal youth international.
